title: Geobalanus oblongifolius
taxonomy: Geobalanus oblongifolius is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. It is classified within the genus Geobalanus, which is a small genus of flowering plants. The family Ericaceae is a large and diverse family of flowering plants commonly known as the heath family. Geobalanus oblongifolius is native to East Asia and is also known as the East Asian geobalanus. The classification of Geobalanus oblongifolius reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Ericaceae family.
